specializations: Specialty esters and emollients for hair care
Sustainable and bio-based hair care ingredients
Crodamol esters for hair lubrication and shine
product_highlights: Crodamol™ esters — premium emolliency and conditioning for hair
Incroquat™ conditioning agents — outstanding detangling and softness
630+ personal care products with comprehensive hair care coverage
Strong sustainability programme with Responsible Care certification
notes: Croda International is a global specialty chemical company with a strong commitment to sustainability and natural ingredients in hair care. Their Crodamol™ ester range provides excellent emolliency and conditioning for hair care applications, while their Incroquat™ conditioning agents deliver outstanding detangling and softness. Croda's sustainability credentials are among the strongest in the industry, with a target of 100% bio-based ingredients by 2030. Their Science Based Targets commitment further differentiates them as a sustainability leader for brands seeking credible green formulation partners.
